LanguageData.XFBullet_Deflection.label: Deflect Bullet
LanguageData.Bullet_HeartSeeker.label: .50 High Speed Dumdum Bullet
LanguageData.XGun_HeartSeeker.label: Heart Seeker
LanguageData.XGun_HeartSeeker.description: A heavy pistol, equipped with weapons at close range of the XEO, the members of the organization like to call this weapon a "Hand Cannon". The high-speed dam bomb fired can cause great blockage and lethality to the creature and the bullet is huge. The huge firepower of the bullets led to the use of a bullet nest design for the chamber, so there were shortcomings such as insufficient storage of ammunition and inconvenient loading. But the members of the organization felt that these are not important because they always pull out their knife before finishing their shots.
LanguageData.XGun_HeartSeeker.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.XGun_HeartSeeker.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.XGun_HeartSeeker_MM.label: Heart Seeker (Melee MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_HeartSeeker_MM.description: A heavy pistol, equipped with weapons at close range of the XEO, the members of the organization like to call this weapon a "Hand Cannon". The high-speed dam bomb fired can cause great blockage and lethality to the creature and the bullet is huge. The huge firepower of the bullets led to the use of a bullet nest design for the chamber, so there were shortcomings such as insufficient storage of ammunition and inconvenient loading. But the members of the organization felt that these are not important because they always pull out their knife before finishing their shots.
LanguageData.XGun_HeartSeeker_MM.tools.0.label: sickle
LanguageData.XGun_HeartSeeker_MM.tools.1.label: bayonet
LanguageData.XGun_HeartSeeker_SM.label: Heart Seeker (Shooting MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_HeartSeeker_SM.description: A heavy pistol, equipped with weapons at close range of the XEO, the members of the organization like to call this weapon a "Hand Cannon". The high-speed dam bomb fired can cause great blockage and lethality to the creature and the bullet is huge. The huge firepower of the bullets led to the use of a bullet nest design for the chamber, so there were shortcomings such as insufficient storage of ammunition and inconvenient loading. But the members of the organization felt that these are not important because they always pull out their knife before finishing their shots.
LanguageData.XGun_HeartSeeker_SM.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.XGun_HeartSeeker_SM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.XGun_HeartSeekerM.label: Heart Seeker MIL
LanguageData.XGun_HeartSeekerM.description: A heavy pistol, equipped with weapons at close range of the XEO, the members of the organization like to call this weapon a "Hand Cannon". The high-speed dam bomb fired can cause great blockage and lethality to the creature and the bullet is huge. The huge firepower of the bullets led to the use of a bullet nest design for the chamber, so there were shortcomings such as insufficient storage of ammunition and inconvenient loading. But the members of the organization felt that these are not important because they always pull out their knife before finishing their shots.
LanguageData.XGun_HeartSeekerM.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.XGun_HeartSeekerM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_WhiteDwarf.label: .45 MP Steel Bullet
LanguageData.XGun_WhiteDwarf.label: White Dwarf
LanguageData.XGun_WhiteDwarf.description: The damage type of this weapon is blunt damage, and it penetrates normal energy shields. A heavy pistol, a medium and close defense weapon produced from Diamond Bone designed to effectively prevent target moving. The MP Steel Bullet with special electric field, can penetrate the normal kinetic shield and produce a strong blocking force when hitting the target. However, this bullet will have a large deviation in long-distance flight, so when you want to attack a distant target, you don’t have to waste time aiming.
LanguageData.XGun_WhiteDwarf.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.XGun_WhiteDwarf.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.XGun_WhiteDwarf_MM.label: White Dwarf (Melee MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_WhiteDwarf_MM.description: The damage type of this weapon is blunt damage, and it penetrates normal energy shields. A heavy pistol, a medium and close defense weapon produced from Diamond Bone designed to effectively prevent target moving. The MP Steel Bullet with special electric field, can penetrate the normal kinetic shield and produce a strong blocking force when hitting the target. However, this bullet will have a large deviation in long-distance flight, so when you want to attack a distant target, you don’t have to waste time aiming.
LanguageData.XGun_WhiteDwarf_MM.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.XGun_WhiteDwarf_MM.tools.1.label: blade
LanguageData.XGun_WhiteDwarf_SM.label: White Dwarf (Shooting MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_WhiteDwarf_SM.description: The damage type of this weapon is blunt damage, and it penetrates normal energy shields. A heavy pistol, a medium and close defense weapon produced from Diamond Bone designed to effectively prevent target moving. The MP Steel Bullet with special electric field, can penetrate the normal kinetic shield and produce a strong blocking force when hitting the target. However, this bullet will have a large deviation in long-distance flight, so when you want to attack a distant target, you don’t have to waste time aiming.
LanguageData.XGun_WhiteDwarf_SM.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.XGun_WhiteDwarf_SM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.XGun_WhiteDwarfM.label: White Dwarf MIL
LanguageData.XGun_WhiteDwarfM.description: The damage type of this weapon is blunt damage, and it penetrates normal energy shields. A heavy pistol, a medium and close defense weapon produced from Diamond Bone designed to effectively prevent target moving. The MP Steel Bullet with special electric field, can penetrate the normal kinetic shield and produce a strong blocking force when hitting the target. However, this bullet will have a large deviation in long-distance flight, so when you want to attack a distant target, you don’t have to waste time aiming.
LanguageData.XGun_WhiteDwarfM.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.XGun_WhiteDwarfM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_FireBeast.label: High Temperature Flame
LanguageData.XGun_FireBeast.label: Fire Beast
LanguageData.XGun_FireBeast.description: A flamethrower. Although it is bulky, it is equipped by many soldiers of the Flame Legion because they think this weapon is "Convenience". What exactly does "Convenience" mean? This is a story. According to legend, a tribal cook prepared 36 people to grill food for a festival. He felt that it was too slow to roast one by one, and he invented a "Kitchenware". Because the food is roasted tender and delicious, this "Kitchenware" has been highly praised in the banquet, and its manufacturing method has also been spread, so the meaning of "Convenience" is...
LanguageData.XGun_FireBeast.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.XGun_FireBeast.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_FireBeast_MM.label: High Temperature Flame
LanguageData.XGun_FireBeast_MM.label: Fire Beast (Melee MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_FireBeast_MM.description: A flamethrower. Although it is bulky, it is equipped by many soldiers of the Flame Legion because they think this weapon is "Convenience". What exactly does "Convenience" mean? This is a story. According to legend, a tribal cook prepared 36 people to grill food for a festival. He felt that it was too slow to roast one by one, and he invented a "Kitchenware". Because the food is roasted tender and delicious, this "Kitchenware" has been highly praised in the banquet, and its manufacturing method has also been spread, so the meaning of "Convenience" is...
LanguageData.XGun_FireBeast_MM.tools.0.label: sickle
LanguageData.XGun_FireBeast_MM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_FireBeast_SM.label: High Temperature Flame
LanguageData.XGun_FireBeast_SM.label: Fire Beast (Shooting MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_FireBeast_SM.description: A flamethrower. Although it is bulky, it is equipped by many soldiers of the Flame Legion because they think this weapon is "Convenience". What exactly does "Convenience" mean? This is a story. According to legend, a tribal cook prepared 36 people to grill food for a festival. He felt that it was too slow to roast one by one, and he invented a "Kitchenware". Because the food is roasted tender and delicious, this "Kitchenware" has been highly praised in the banquet, and its manufacturing method has also been spread, so the meaning of "Convenience" is...
LanguageData.XGun_FireBeast_SM.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.XGun_FireBeast_SM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.XGun_FireBeastM.label: Fire Beast MIL
LanguageData.XGun_FireBeastM.description: A flamethrower. Although it is bulky, it is equipped by many soldiers of the Flame Legion because they think this weapon is "Convenience". What exactly does "Convenience" mean? This is a story. According to legend, a tribal cook prepared 36 people to grill food for a festival. He felt that it was too slow to roast one by one, and he invented a "Kitchenware". Because the food is roasted tender and delicious, this "Kitchenware" has been highly praised in the banquet, and its manufacturing method has also been spread, so the meaning of "Convenience" is...
LanguageData.XGun_FireBeastM.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.XGun_FireBeastM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_RainStorm.label: 9mm General Purpose Bullet
LanguageData.XGun_RainStorm.label: Rain Storm
LanguageData.XGun_RainStorm.description: A light machine gun. That the Jaeger used to replace the pistol. Close-range weapons with a high rate of fire can effectively carry out cross-fire and continuous suppression. However, the stability of this gun is very poor and the bullets have floated in the middle distance. There was a record that an officer was beaten by a soldier with a Rain Storm behind because he was rushing ahead.
LanguageData.XGun_RainStorm.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.XGun_RainStorm.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.XGun_RainStorm_MM.label: Rain Storm (Melee MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_RainStorm_MM.description: A light machine gun. That the Jaeger used to replace the pistol. Close-range weapons with a high rate of fire can effectively carry out cross-fire and continuous suppression. However, the stability of this gun is very poor and the bullets have floated in the middle distance. There was a record that an officer was beaten by a soldier with a Rain Storm behind because he was rushing ahead.
LanguageData.XGun_RainStorm_MM.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.XGun_RainStorm_MM.tools.1.label: bayonet
LanguageData.XGun_RainStorm_SM.label: Rain Storm (Shooting MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_RainStorm_SM.description: A light machine gun. That the Jaeger used to replace the pistol. Close-range weapons with a high rate of fire can effectively carry out cross-fire and continuous suppression. However, the stability of this gun is very poor and the bullets have floated in the middle distance. There was a record that an officer was beaten by a soldier with a Rain Storm behind because he was rushing ahead.
LanguageData.XGun_RainStorm_SM.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.XGun_RainStorm_SM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.XGun_RainStormM.label: Rain Storm MIL
LanguageData.XGun_RainStormM.description: A light machine gun. That the Jaeger used to replace the pistol. Close-range weapons with a high rate of fire can effectively carry out cross-fire and continuous suppression. However, the stability of this gun is very poor and the bullets have floated in the middle distance. There was a record that an officer was beaten by a soldier with a Rain Storm behind because he was rushing ahead.
LanguageData.XGun_RainStormM.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.XGun_RainStormM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_Rapid.label: 9mm General Purpose Bullet
LanguageData.XGun_Rapid.label: Rapid
LanguageData.XGun_Rapid.description: Semi-automatic pistol. Standard equipment for Star Explorer, weapons for home and travel. It has a high rate of fire and is stable. Most of the components are made of graphite fiber, which is hardly affected by the metal fatigue caused by the continuous fire. There have been records of 1000 shots of the pistol without jamming. Because of its light weight and low recoil, it is especially popular with women.
LanguageData.XGun_Rapid.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.XGun_Rapid.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.XGun_Rapid_MM.label: Rapid (Melee MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_Rapid_MM.description: Semi-automatic pistol. Standard equipment for Star Explorer, weapons for home and travel. It has a high rate of fire and is stable. Most of the components are made of graphite fiber, which is hardly affected by the metal fatigue caused by the continuous fire. There have been records of 1000 shots of the pistol without jamming. Because of its light weight and low recoil, it is especially popular with women.
LanguageData.XGun_Rapid_MM.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.XGun_Rapid_MM.tools.1.label: bayonet
LanguageData.Bullet_Rapid_SM.label: 9mm General Purpose Bullet
LanguageData.XGun_Rapid_SM.label: Rapid (Shooting MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_Rapid_SM.description: Semi-automatic pistol. Standard equipment for Star Explorer, weapons for home and travel. It has a high rate of fire and is stable. Most of the components are made of graphite fiber, which is hardly affected by the metal fatigue caused by the continuous fire. There have been records of 1000 shots of the pistol without jamming. Because of its light weight and low recoil, it is especially popular with women.

LanguageData.XGun_Rapid_SM.tools.1.label: barrel

Most of the components are made of graphite fiber, which is hardly affected by the metal fatigue caused by the continuous fire. There have been records of 1000 shots of the pistol without jamming. Because of its light weight and low recoil, it is especially popular with women.
LanguageData.XGun_RapidM.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.XGun_RapidM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_GvE.label: .38 Black Core Bullet
LanguageData.XGun_GvE.label: Good vs Evil
LanguageData.XGun_GvE.description: A Double pistol. It consists of two pistols with different recoil and firepower. It needs to rotate in accordance with the recoil of the fire to make the true power of these two guns. However, how can you aim at the target after rotation? So it is said that to use these guns, you must first learn Gun Fu. The scary thing is that many people blasted their mentors and even their heads in the process of learning.
LanguageData.XGun_GvE.tools.0.label: good
LanguageData.XGun_GvE.tools.1.label: evil
LanguageData.XGun_GvE_MM.label: Good vs Evil (Melee MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_GvE_MM.description: A Double pistol. It consists of two pistols with different recoil and firepower. It needs to rotate in accordance with the recoil of the fire to make the true power of these two guns. However, how can you aim at the target after rotation? So it is said that to use these guns, you must first learn Gun Fu. The scary thing is that many people blasted their mentors and even their heads in the process of learning.
LanguageData.XGun_GvE_MM.tools.0.label: good
LanguageData.XGun_GvE_MM.tools.1.label: evil
LanguageData.XGun_GvE_SM.label: Good vs Evil (Shooting MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_GvE_SM.description: A Double pistol. It consists of two pistols with different recoil and firepower. It needs to rotate in accordance with the recoil of the fire to make the true power of these two guns. However, how can you aim at the target after rotation? So it is said that to use these guns, you must first learn Gun Fu. The scary thing is that many people blasted their mentors and even their heads in the process of learning.
LanguageData.XGun_GvE_SM.tools.0.label: good
LanguageData.XGun_GvE_SM.tools.1.label: evil
LanguageData.Bullet_ToughGuy.label: .44 Flat Nose Bullet
LanguageData.XGun_ToughGuy.label: Tough Guy
LanguageData.XGun_ToughGuy.description: The damage type of this weapon is blunt damage. A heavy pistol. There was a very stubborn pirate who insisted on using pistols as weapons. He ignored the dissuasion of his companions and commanders. He did not use other firearms, and he added sights to the pistols to deal with long-range combat. One day, he used this pistol to shoot a soldier wearing power armor, and finally fought for an afternoon. Although he was shot multiple times, he shot the soldiers to death. This weapon has also become a symbol of the tough guy "You may not be very good, but super hard".
LanguageData.XGun_ToughGuy.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.XGun_ToughGuy.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.XGun_ToughGuyM.label: Tough Guy MIL
LanguageData.XGun_ToughGuyM.description: The damage type of this weapon is blunt damage. A heavy pistol. There was a very stubborn pirate who insisted on using pistols as weapons. He ignored the dissuasion of his companions and commanders. He did not use other firearms, and he added sights to the pistols to deal with long-range combat. One day, he used this pistol to shoot a soldier wearing power armor, and finally fought for an afternoon. Although he was shot multiple times, he shot the soldiers to death. This weapon has also become a symbol of the tough guy "You may not be very good, but super hard".
LanguageData.XGun_ToughGuyM.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.XGun_ToughGuyM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_Fuse.label: Plasma
LanguageData.XGun_Fuse.label: Fuse
LanguageData.XGun_Fuse.description: A heat damage pistol. The weapon of the pirate king period. Launching plasma was very fatal in an environment where armor development was not mature at the time. There have been many voices against research in the pirates, but the pirate king ruled out the public opinion and insisted on creating weapons with overwhelming power. This pistol, which was first researched and mass-produced, became the fuse of his future betrayal.
LanguageData.XGun_Fuse.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.XGun_Fuse.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.XGun_FuseM.label: Fuse MIL
LanguageData.XGun_FuseM.description: A heat damage pistol. The weapon of the pirate king period. Launching plasma was very fatal in an environment where armor development was not mature at the time. There have been many voices against research in the pirates, but the pirate king ruled out the public opinion and insisted on creating weapons with overwhelming power. This pistol, which was first researched and mass-produced, became the fuse of his future betrayal.
LanguageData.XGun_FuseM.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.XGun_FuseM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_Horizon.label: 20mm Shock Bullet
LanguageData.XGun_Horizon.label: Horizon
LanguageData.XGun_Horizon.description: A blunt damage rifle. This weapon will stun the target when it hits the head. The Diamond Bone Horizon rifle has good performance instability and a rate of fire. The special shape of its bullet warhead will generate impact when hitting the target to brake and stop the target, but in exchange for it has almost no armor-piercing effect. Some people think that this is a good thing because they like to use this gun to hit the head of the helmet family, look at their faces when they are dizzy, and grab them when they are beautiful.
LanguageData.XGun_Horizon.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_Horizon.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.XGun_Horizon_MM.label: Horizon (Melee MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_Horizon_MM.description: A blunt damage rifle. This weapon will stun the target when it hits the head. The Diamond Bone Horizon rifle has good performance instability and a rate of fire. The special shape of its bullet warhead will generate impact when hitting the target to brake and stop the target, but in exchange for it has almost no armor-piercing effect. Some people think that this is a good thing because they like to use this gun to hit the head of the helmet family, look at their faces when they are dizzy, and grab them when they are beautiful.
LanguageData.XGun_Horizon_MM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_Horizon_MM.tools.1.label: sickle
LanguageData.XGun_Horizon_SM.label: Horizon (Shooting MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_Horizon_SM.description: A blunt damage rifle. This weapon will stun the target when it hits the head. The Diamond Bone Horizon rifle has good performance instability and a rate of fire. The special shape of its bullet warhead will generate impact when hitting the target to brake and stop the target, but in exchange for it has almost no armor-piercing effect. Some people think that this is a good thing because they like to use this gun to hit the head of the helmet family, look at their faces when they are dizzy, and grab them when they are beautiful.
LanguageData.XGun_Horizon_SM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_Horizon_SM.tools.1.label: barrel

LanguageData.XGun_HorizonM.description: A blunt damage rifle. This weapon will stun the target when it hits the head. The Diamond Bone Horizon rifle has good performance instability and a rate of fire. The special shape of its bullet warhead will generate impact when hitting the target to brake and stop the target, but in exchange for it has almost no armor-piercing effect. Some people think that this is a good thing because they like to use this gun to hit the head of the helmet family, look at their faces when they are dizzy, and grab them when they are beautiful.
LanguageData.XGun_HorizonM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_HorizonM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_Roar.label: 70mm Scatter Bullet
LanguageData.XGun_Roar.label: Roar
LanguageData.XGun_Roar.description: A large heat damage shotgun. The Flame Legion's Roar shotgun is a very cruel weapon. The bullets it uses are much larger than conventional shotguns, and in order to increase the lethality, the steel balls are replaced with fragments. A military doctor once said that if a light machine gun can make people into a honeycomb, this weapon is to make people into a meat sauce. There are so many wounds that even the automatic medical bed of midworld can't handle it. The injured person said, "I think I can be rescue..e..d..." He was dead before he finished talking.
LanguageData.XGun_Roar.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_Roar.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_Roar_MM.label: 70mm Scatter Bullet
LanguageData.XGun_Roar_MM.label: Roar (Melee MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_Roar_MM.description: A large heat damage shotgun. The Flame Legion's Roar shotgun is a very cruel weapon. The bullets it uses are much larger than conventional shotguns, and in order to increase the lethality, the steel balls are replaced with fragments. A military doctor once said that if a light machine gun can make people into a honeycomb, this weapon is to make people into a meat sauce. There are so many wounds that even the automatic medical bed of midworld can't handle it. The injured person said, "I think I can be rescue..e..d..." He was dead before he finished talking.
LanguageData.XGun_Roar_MM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_Roar_MM.tools.1.label: bayonet
LanguageData.Bullet_Roar_SM.label: 70mm Scatter Bullet
LanguageData.XGun_Roar_SM.label: Roar (Shooting MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_Roar_SM.description: A large heat damage shotgun. The Flame Legion's Roar shotgun is a very cruel weapon. The bullets it uses are much larger than conventional shotguns, and in order to increase the lethality, the steel balls are replaced with fragments. There are so many wounds that even the automatic medical bed of midworld can't handle it. The injured person said, "I think I can be rescue..e..d..." He was dead before he finished talking.

LanguageData.XGun_Roar_SM.tools.1.label: barrel

The bullets it uses are much larger than conventional shotguns, and in order to increase the lethality, the steel balls are replaced with fragments. A military doctor once said that if a light machine gun can make people into a honeycomb, this weapon is to make people into a meat sauce. There are so many wounds that even the automatic medical bed of midworld can't handle it. The injured person said, "I think I can be rescue..e..d..." He was dead before he finished talking.
LanguageData.XGun_RoarM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_RoarM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_Python.label: 12.7 Steel Core Bullet
LanguageData.XGun_Python.label: Python
LanguageData.XGun_Python.description: A machine gun. The python machine gun is a Jaegar's class machine gun. The bullet has a good braking force and its range is also an advantage. The Jaegar uses it to create long-range fire suppression. However, the back seat of this weapon is huge, and the gun body will rise seriously. Once, a new soldier stunned down the officer standing behind because of the recoil of the gun during training.
LanguageData.XGun_Python.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_Python.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_Python_MM.label: 12.7 Steel Core Bullet
LanguageData.XGun_Python_MM.label: Python (Melee MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_Python_MM.description: A machine gun. The python machine gun is a Jaegar's class machine gun. The bullet has a good braking force and its range is also an advantage. The Jaegar uses it to create long-range fire suppression. However, the back seat of this weapon is huge, and the gun body will rise seriously. Once, a new soldier stunned down the officer standing behind because of the recoil of the gun during training.
LanguageData.XGun_Python_MM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_Python_MM.tools.1.label: bayonet
LanguageData.Bullet_Python_SM.label: 12.7 Steel Core Bullet
LanguageData.XGun_Python_SM.label: Python (Shooting MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_Python_SM.description: A machine gun. The python machine gun is a Jaegar's class machine gun. The bullet has a good braking force and its range is also an advantage. The Jaegar uses it to create long-range fire suppression. However, the back seat of this weapon is huge, and the gun body will rise seriously. LanguageData.XGun_PythonM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_PythonM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_BlueBee.label: 5mm Carbon Crystal Bullet
LanguageData.XGun_BlueBee.label: Blue Bee
LanguageData.XGun_BlueBee.description: A pulse rifle. It uses carbon crystal bullets and has excellent armor-piercing effects. It is one of the products that the Star Explorer is proud of. The name Blue Bee because it will make a buzzing sound after starting. People like to call it a BB gun. The note on the butt is printed "Don’t bring this gun to animals." This is because an explorer once used this gun to tame the unicorn and was trampled into meat sauce.
LanguageData.XGun_BlueBee.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_BlueBee.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_BlueBee_MM.label: 5mm Carbon Crystal Bullet
LanguageData.XGun_BlueBee_MM.label: Blue Bee (Melee MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_BlueBee_MM.description: A pulse rifle. It uses carbon crystal bullets and has excellent armor-piercing effects. It is one of the products that the Star Explorer is proud of. The name Blue Bee because it will make a buzzing sound after starting. People like to call it a BB gun. The note on the butt is printed "Don’t bring this gun to animals." This is because an explorer once used this gun to tame the unicorn and was trampled into meat sauce.
LanguageData.XGun_BlueBee_MM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_BlueBee_MM.tools.1.label: blade
LanguageData.Bullet_BlueBee_SM.label: 5mm Carbon Crystal Bullet
LanguageData.XGun_BlueBee_SM.label: Blue Bee (Shooting MOD)

LanguageData.XGun_BlueBeeM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_BlueBeeM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_Assassin.label: 8mm Tracer Bullet
LanguageData.XGun_Assassin.label: Assassin
LanguageData.XGun_Assassin.description: A single-shot rifle. Good range, stability, and noise reduction effect. It is the favorite firearm of the XEO assassin. This gun could have auto-fire mode, and it became a single shot because of an accident. The assassins will remove the silencer before the assassination, and fire gunshot to air at a high place. The number of gunshots represents how many people will die. This is done to give the target a fair chance to survive, and the assassin can also demonstrate his ability to gain fame. This ritual is called the "Knell of Death". It is said that a female assassin once fired a gun in the clock tower without turning off the automatic mode. She shot five times in a row and one of the shots hit the big bell. There is actually only one assassination target. She hesitated whether to kill someone to fill the numbers. At this time, the assassination target that was alarmed by the bell found her and shot at her. Her knee was hit and became a "Fallen Girl". She rolled off the clock tower. Although she made a standard "Leap of Faith" at the last minute, not every bell tower has haystacks... Because her death was so funny, this thing was spread madly everywhere, which damaged the reputation of XEO. After this incident, the auto key of the gun was disappeared.
LanguageData.XGun_Assassin.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_Assassin.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.XGun_Assassin_MM.label: Assassin (Melee MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_Assassin_MM.description: A single-shot rifle. Good range, stability, and noise reduction effect. It is the favorite firearm of the XEO assassin. This gun could have auto-fire mode, and it became a single shot because of an accident. The assassins will remove the silencer before the assassination, and fire gunshot to air at a high place. The number of gunshots represents how many people will die. This is done to give the target a fair chance to survive, and the assassin can also demonstrate his ability to gain fame. This ritual is called the "Knell of Death". It is said that a female assassin once fired a gun in the clock tower without turning off the automatic mode. She shot five times in a row and one of the shots hit the big bell. There is actually only one assassination target. She hesitated whether to kill someone to fill the numbers. At this time, the assassination target that was alarmed by the bell found her and shot at her. Her knee was hit and became a "Fallen Girl". She rolled off the clock tower. Although she made a standard "Leap of Faith" at the last minute, not every bell tower has haystacks... Because her death was so funny, this thing was spread madly everywhere, which damaged the reputation of XEO. After this incident, the auto key of the gun was disappeared.
LanguageData.XGun_Assassin_MM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_Assassin_MM.tools.1.label: bayonet
LanguageData.Bullet_AssassinSM.label: 8mm Tracer Bullet
LanguageData.XGun_Assassin_SM.label: Assassin (Shooting MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_Assassin_SM.description: I just like to put the automatic key back.
LanguageData.XGun_Assassin_SM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_Assassin_SM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.XGun_AssassinM.label: Assassin MIL
LanguageData.XGun_AssassinM.description: A single-shot rifle. Good range, stability, and noise reduction effect. It is the favorite firearm of the XEO assassin. This gun could have auto-fire mode, and it became a single shot because of an accident. The assassins will remove the silencer before the assassination, and fire gunshot to air at a high place. The number of gunshots represents how many people will die. This is done to give the target a fair chance to survive, and the assassin can also demonstrate his ability to gain fame. This ritual is called the "Knell of Death". It is said that a female assassin once fired a gun in the clock tower without turning off the automatic mode. She shot five times in a row and one of the shots hit the big bell. There is actually only one assassination target. She hesitated whether to kill someone to fill the numbers. At this time, the assassination target that was alarmed by the bell found her and shot at her. Her knee was hit and became a "Fallen Girl". She rolled off the clock tower. Although she made a standard "Leap of Faith" at the last minute, not every bell tower has haystacks... Because her death was so funny, this thing was spread madly everywhere, which damaged the reputation of XEO. After this incident, the auto key of the gun was disappeared.
LanguageData.XGun_AssassinM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_AssassinM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_Eclipse.label: 7.62 Tracer Bullet
LanguageData.XGun_Eclipse.label: Eclipse
LanguageData.XGun_Eclipse.description: A Minigun, overwhelming bullets can cover the sun, so it is called eclipse. There was a group of aboriginal people who are trait with trigger-happy and used this weapon to repel the Jaeger, but after the battle, all the people's arms broken.
LanguageData.XGun_Eclipse.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_Eclipse_MM.label: 7.62 Tracer Bullet
LanguageData.XGun_Eclipse_MM.label: Eclipse (Melee MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_Eclipse_MM.description: A Minigun, overwhelming bullets can cover the sun, so it is called eclipse. There was a group of aboriginal people who are trait with trigger-happy and used this weapon to repel the Jaeger, but after the battle, all the people's arms broken.
LanguageData.XGun_Eclipse_MM.tools.0.label: axe
LanguageData.Bullet_Eclipse_SM.label: 7.62 Tracer Bullet
LanguageData.XGun_Eclipse_SM.label: Eclipse (Shooting MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_Eclipse_SM.description: A Minigun, overwhelming bullets can cover the sun, so it is called eclipse. There was a group of aboriginal people who are trait with trigger-happy and used this weapon to repel the Jaeger, but after the battle, all the people's arms broken.
LanguageData.XGun_Eclipse_SM.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_Disturber.label: 40mm Extended Grenade
LanguageData.XGun_Disturber.label: Disturber
LanguageData.XGun_Disturber.description: A grenade gun. Disturber can send small grenade into the high wall, even the roof can penetrate. Do you want to watch the enemy dance? Use this to get it right. Because of its long range, large grenades cannot be used, so the destructive power is limited, but this is not important, because this weapon is originally used to make trouble, Ho Yeah!
LanguageData.XGun_Disturber.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_Disturber_EMP.label: 60mm EMP Grenade
LanguageData.XGun_Disturber_EMP.label: Disturber (EMP)
LanguageData.XGun_Disturber_EMP.description: A grenade gun. Disturber can send small grenade into the high wall, even the roof can penetrate. Do you want to watch the enemy dance? Use this to get it right. Because of its long range, large grenades cannot be used, so the destructive power is limited, but this is not important, because this weapon is originally used to make trouble, Ho Yeah!

Use this to get it right. Because of its long range, large grenades cannot be used, so the destructive power is limited, but this is not important, because this weapon is originally used to make trouble, Ho Yeah!

Because of its long range, large grenades cannot be used, so the destructive power is limited, but this is not important, because this weapon is originally used to make trouble, Ho Yeah!
LanguageData.XGun_DisturberM.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_IronBall.label: 100mm Iron Ball
LanguageData.XGun_IronBall.label: Iron Ball
LanguageData.XGun_IronBall.description: A blunt damage rifle. The kinetic energy weapon that fired the big iron ball. It is said that the designer designed this weapon because "B-Daman" played too much. However, this is not a toy. Many people have despised this seemingly non-lethal iron ball. Finally, their "Ball" broke into pieces.
LanguageData.XGun_IronBall.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_IronBall.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.XGun_IronBallM.label: Iron Ball MIL
LanguageData.XGun_IronBallM.description: A blunt damage rifle. The kinetic energy weapon that fired the big iron ball. It is said that the designer designed this weapon because "B-Daman" played too much. However, this is not a toy. Many people have despised this seemingly non-lethal iron ball. Finally, their "Ball" broke into pieces.
LanguageData.XGun_IronBallM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_IronBallM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_Heat.label: Plasma
LanguageData.XGun_Heat.label: Heat
LanguageData.XGun_Heat.description: A heat damage rifle, a weapon of the pirate king period. Developed after the fuse pistol. Which fired plasma to cause heat damage, the purpose is to cope with medium and long-distance combat. In order to achieve the effect of fire suppression, a high fire rate design is used. However, the high temperature of the plasma causes the airflow to be unstable, resulting in deviations from long-range hits. The high temperature and continuous fire also cause serious metal fatigue in the barrel after a round of shooting. So only with a large amount of equipment can see the true power of this weapon.
LanguageData.XGun_Heat.tools.0.label: bayonet
LanguageData.XGun_Heat.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.XGun_HeatM.label: Heat MIL
LanguageData.XGun_HeatM.description: A heat damage rifle, a weapon of the pirate king period. Developed after the fuse pistol. Which fired plasma to cause heat damage, the purpose is to cope with medium and long-distance combat. In order to achieve the effect of fire suppression, a high fire rate design is used. However, the high temperature of the plasma causes the airflow to be unstable, resulting in deviations from long-range hits. The high temperature and continuous fire also cause serious metal fatigue in the barrel after a round of shooting. So only with a large amount of equipment can see the true power of this weapon.
LanguageData.XGun_HeatM.tools.0.label: bayonet
LanguageData.XGun_HeatM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_CPW.label: Electron Beam
LanguageData.XGun_CPW.label: Charged Particle Weapon
LanguageData.XGun_CPW.description: A heavy long-range weapon used by Diamond Bone. Please make sure that there are no teammates in front of you before use. Remember not to let anyone who has a record of trigger-happy use it. Once a training officer was bombed by the gun because he forgot to read the student’s "Bio Menu".
LanguageData.XGun_CPW.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.XGun_CPW_MM.label: Charged Particle Weapon (Melee MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_CPW_MM.description: A heavy long-range weapon used by Diamond Bone. Please make sure that there are no teammates in front of you before use. Remember not to let anyone who has a record of trigger-happy use it. Once a training officer was bombed by the gun because he forgot to read the student’s "Bio Menu".
LanguageData.XGun_CPW_MM.tools.0.label: bayonet
LanguageData.XGun_CPW_SM.label: Charged Particle Weapon (Shooting MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_CPW_SM.description: A heavy long-range weapon used by Diamond Bone. Please make sure that there are no teammates in front of you before use. Remember not to let anyone who has a record of trigger-happy use it. Once a training officer was bombed by the gun because he forgot to read the student’s "Bio Menu".
LanguageData.XGun_CPW_SM.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.XGun_CPWMWC.label: Charged Particle Weapon MIL WC
LanguageData.XGun_CPWMWC.description: A heavy long-range weapon used by Diamond Bone. Please make sure that there are no teammates in front of you before use. Remember not to let anyone who has a record of trigger-happy use it. Once a training officer was bombed by the gun because he forgot to read the student’s "Bio Menu".
LanguageData.XGun_CPWMWC.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_WolfHowl.label: Positron
LanguageData.Bullet_WolfHowlMM.label: Positron
LanguageData.Bullet_WolfHowlSM.label: Positron
LanguageData.XGun_WolfHowl.label: Wolf Howl
LanguageData.XGun_WolfHowl.description: A positron weapon, the huge echo when firing is similar to howling wolves, so it is called Wolf Howl. Many Jaeger snipers did not use this weapon in accordance with safety regulations and had made a lot of casualties in frontline troops, which made this weapon banned for a period of time. Some snipers accused by the military court refuted "It's not that my shooting skill is a problem, it's you who ran in and killed yourself."
LanguageData.XGun_WolfHowl.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_WolfHowl.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.XGun_WolfHowl_MM.label: Wolf Howl (Melee MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_WolfHowl_MM.description: A positron weapon, the huge echo when firing is similar to howling wolves, so it is called Wolf Howl. Many Jaeger snipers did not use this weapon in accordance with safety regulations and had made a lot of casualties in frontline troops, which made this weapon banned for a period of time. Some snipers accused by the military court refuted "It's not that my shooting skill is a problem, it's you who ran in and killed yourself."
LanguageData.XGun_WolfHowl_MM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_WolfHowl_MM.tools.1.label: blade
LanguageData.XGun_WolfHowl_SM.label: Wolf Howl (Shooting MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_WolfHowl_SM.description: A positron weapon, the huge echo when firing is similar to howling wolves, so it is called Wolf Howl. Many Jaeger snipers did not use this weapon in accordance with safety regulations and had made a lot of casualties in frontline troops, which made this weapon banned for a period of time. Some snipers accused by the military court refuted "It's not that my shooting skill is a problem, it's you who ran in and killed yourself."
LanguageData.XGun_WolfHowl_SM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_WolfHowl_SM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_HeadShot.label: Unknown Bullet
LanguageData.XGun_HeadShot.label: Head Shot
LanguageData.XGun_HeadShot.description: The bullets of this weapon can fly through the wall. A heat damage sniper rifle. This gun has only appeared in Flame Legion’s forces. The body of the gun has no firing structure at all. In simple terms, it is a sculpture shaped like a firearm, so the bullets it fires are very unstable. Head being hit by this unstable bullet will be like an exploding watermelon, so this weapon is called Headshot. Although it is very unscientific, it does have a large number of records of killing targets. No matter the location is a secret room, a basement, a variety of rooms...even prison cells, It also has a record of its kills. And behind this weapon is a story of an Avengers. A fat man once confessed to a "Beautiful" woman many times and was rejected, and a newly joined boy confessed to the woman for the first time and succeeded, which hurt the fat man. Curiosity, he secretly opened the boy's "Bio Menu" to check and found that all the values were lower than him, there was only one "Pretty" trait, and then the fat boy who was desperate left the village. A few years later, when the woman and her husband were intimate in the bedroom, her beautiful face suddenly exploded, scaring her husband's "Dick" to soften and urinate all over the place. And what made people more scared was that the bullet did not hit in a straight line. So there is a legend that was not a bullet shot from the gun, but a kind of anger from FFF. "Did your partner's brain suddenly spray on your face? Don't be surprised, because justice has come!"
LanguageData.XGun_HeadShot.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_HeadShot.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.XGun_HeadShot_MM.label: Head Shot (Melee MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_HeadShot_MM.description: The bullets of this weapon can fly through the wall. A heat damage sniper rifle. This gun has only appeared in Flame Legion’s forces. The body of the gun has no firing structure at all. In simple terms, it is a sculpture shaped like a firearm, so the bullets it fires are very unstable. Head being hit by this unstable bullet will be like an exploding watermelon, so this weapon is called Headshot. Although it is very unscientific, it does have a large number of records of killing targets. No matter the location is a secret room, a basement, a variety of rooms...even prison cells, It also has a record of its kills. And behind this weapon is a story of an Avengers. A fat man once confessed to a "Beautiful" woman many times and was rejected, and a newly joined boy confessed to the woman for the first time and succeeded, which hurt the fat man. Curiosity, he secretly opened the boy's "Bio Menu" to check and found that all the values were lower than him, there was only one "Pretty" trait, and then the fat boy who was desperate left the village. A few years later, when the woman and her husband were intimate in the bedroom, her beautiful face suddenly exploded, scaring her husband's "Dick" to soften and urinate all over the place. And what made people more scared was that the bullet did not hit in a straight line. So there is a legend that was not a bullet shot from the gun, but a kind of anger from FFF. "Did your partner's brain suddenly spray on your face? Don't be surprised, because justice has come!"
LanguageData.XGun_HeadShot_MM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_HeadShot_MM.tools.1.label: axe
LanguageData.XGun_HeadShot_SM.label: Head Shot (Shooting MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_HeadShot_SM.description: The bullets of this weapon can fly through the wall. A heat damage sniper rifle. This gun has only appeared in Flame Legion’s forces. The body of the gun has no firing structure at all. In simple terms, it is a sculpture shaped like a firearm, so the bullets it fires are very unstable. Head being hit by this unstable bullet will be like an exploding watermelon, so this weapon is called Headshot. Although it is very unscientific, it does have a large number of records of killing targets. No matter the location is a secret room, a basement, a variety of rooms...even prison cells, It also has a record of its kills. And behind this weapon is a story of an Avengers. A fat man once confessed to a "Beautiful" woman many times and was rejected, and a newly joined boy confessed to the woman for the first time and succeeded, which hurt the fat man. Curiosity, he secretly opened the boy's "Bio Menu" to check and found that all the values were lower than him, there was only one "Pretty" trait, and then the fat boy who was desperate left the village. A few years later, when the woman and her husband were intimate in the bedroom, her beautiful face suddenly exploded, scaring her husband's "Dick" to soften and urinate all over the place. And what made people more scared was that the bullet did not hit in a straight line. So there is a legend that was not a bullet shot from the gun, but a kind of anger from FFF. "Did your partner's brain suddenly spray on your face? Don't be surprised, because justice has come!"
LanguageData.XGun_HeadShot_SM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_HeadShot_SM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.XGun_HeadShotM.label: Head Shot MIL
LanguageData.XGun_HeadShotM.description: The bullets of this weapon can fly through the wall. A heat damage sniper rifle. This gun has only appeared in Flame Legion’s forces. The body of the gun has no firing structure at all. In simple terms, it is a sculpture shaped like a firearm, so the bullets it fires are very unstable. Head being hit by this unstable bullet will be like an exploding watermelon, so this weapon is called Headshot. Although it is very unscientific, it does have a large number of records of killing targets. No matter the location is a secret room, a basement, a variety of rooms...even prison cells, It also has a record of its kills. And behind this weapon is a story of an Avengers. A fat man once confessed to a "Beautiful" woman many times and was rejected, and a newly joined boy confessed to the woman for the first time and succeeded, which hurt the fat man. Curiosity, he secretly opened the boy's "Bio Menu" to check and found that all the values were lower than him, there was only one "Pretty" trait, and then the fat boy who was desperate left the village. A few years later, when the woman and her husband were intimate in the bedroom, her beautiful face suddenly exploded, scaring her husband's "Dick" to soften and urinate all over the place. And what made people more scared was that the bullet did not hit in a straight line. So there is a legend that was not a bullet shot from the gun, but a kind of anger from FFF. "Did your partner's brain suddenly spray on your face? Don't be surprised, because justice has come!"
LanguageData.XGun_HeadShotM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_HeadShotM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_EagleEye.label: 7.62 Steel Core Bullet
LanguageData.XGun_EagleEye.label: Eagle Eye
LanguageData.XGun_EagleEye.description: Jaeger's favorite sniper rifle has the characteristics of long-range and lightweight, which makes it easy for the sniper to find and transfer the sniper point. And the double-click shooting method they usually use is from a legendary shooter. It is said that Jaeger has stimulated many resistance forces because of monopoly resources. A man of them makes Jaeger scared. His aiming speed is incredible, two consecutive shots every time. The "parts" of the human body he chooses to shoot are even more unbearable. Many Jaeger thought he did it deliberately to create fear. Because of his magical precision and speed, he was called "Eagle Eye" by Jaeger. A few years later, Eagle Eye was arrested in a spy campaign. The military sent him to torture out of curiosity. Shockingly, Eagle Eye is born with amblyopia, the reason for acting alone is because of fear of shooting teammates. As for his explanation of the extraordinary skill, he replied extraordinarily "I didn't aim at all, just hit two shots at the approximate place, but your imagination is great." Because he was so amazing, in the end, he not only without being executed, he fell in love with the torture officer and became Jaeger's sniper chief instructor. This gun is named after this.
LanguageData.XGun_EagleEye.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_EagleEye.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.XGun_EagleEye_MM.label: Eagle Eye (Melee MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_EagleEye_MM.description: Jaeger's favorite sniper rifle has the characteristics of long-range and lightweight, which makes it easy for the sniper to find and transfer the sniper point. And the double-click shooting method they usually use is from a legendary shooter. It is said that Jaeger has stimulated many resistance forces because of monopoly resources. A man of them makes Jaeger scared. His aiming speed is incredible, two consecutive shots every time. The "parts" of the human body he chooses to shoot are even more unbearable. Many Jaeger thought he did it deliberately to create fear. Because of his magical precision and speed, he was called "Eagle Eye" by Jaeger. A few years later, Eagle Eye was arrested in a spy campaign. The military sent him to torture out of curiosity. Shockingly, Eagle Eye is born with amblyopia, the reason for acting alone is because of fear of shooting teammates. As for his explanation of the extraordinary skill, he replied extraordinarily "I didn't aim at all, just hit two shots at the approximate place, but your imagination is great." Because he was so amazing, in the end, he not only without being executed, he fell in love with the torture officer and became Jaeger's sniper chief instructor. This gun is named after this.
LanguageData.XGun_EagleEye_MM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_EagleEye_MM.tools.1.label: blade
LanguageData.XGun_EagleEye_SM.label: Eagle Eye (Shooting MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_EagleEye_SM.description: Jaeger's favorite sniper rifle has the characteristics of long-range and lightweight, which makes it easy for the sniper to find and transfer the sniper point. And the double-click shooting method they usually use is from a legendary shooter. It is said that Jaeger has stimulated many resistance forces because of monopoly resources. A man of them makes Jaeger scared. His aiming speed is incredible, two consecutive shots every time. The "parts" of the human body he chooses to shoot are even more unbearable. Many Jaeger thought he did it deliberately to create fear. Because of his magical precision and speed, he was called "Eagle Eye" by Jaeger. A few years later, Eagle Eye was arrested in a spy campaign. The military sent him to torture out of curiosity. Shockingly, Eagle Eye is born with amblyopia, the reason for acting alone is because of fear of shooting teammates. As for his explanation of the extraordinary skill, he replied extraordinarily "I didn't aim at all, just hit two shots at the approximate place, but your imagination is great." Because he was so amazing, in the end, he not only without being executed, he fell in love with the torture officer and became Jaeger's sniper chief instructor. This gun is named after this.
LanguageData.XGun_EagleEye_SM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_EagleEye_SM.tools.1.label: barrel

LanguageData.XGun_EagleEyeM.description: Jaeger's favorite sniper rifle has the characteristics of long-range and lightweight, which makes it easy for the sniper to find and transfer the sniper point. And the double-click shooting method they usually use is from a legendary shooter. It is said that Jaeger has stimulated many resistance forces because of monopoly resources. A man of them makes Jaeger scared. His aiming speed is incredible, two consecutive shots every time. The "parts" of the human body he chooses to shoot are even more unbearable. Many Jaeger thought he did it deliberately to create fear. Because of his magical precision and speed, he was called "Eagle Eye" by Jaeger. A few years later, Eagle Eye was arrested in a spy campaign. The military sent him to torture out of curiosity. Shockingly, Eagle Eye is born with amblyopia, the reason for acting alone is because of fear of shooting teammates. As for his explanation of the extraordinary skill, he replied extraordinarily "I didn't aim at all, just hit two shots at the approximate place, but your imagination is great." Because he was so amazing, in the end, he not only without being executed, he fell in love with the torture officer and became Jaeger's sniper chief instructor. This gun is named after this.
LanguageData.XGun_EagleEyeM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_EagleEyeM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_Probe.label: 7.62 Carbon Crystal AP Bullet
LanguageData.XGun_Probe.label: Probe
LanguageData.XGun_Probe.description: A gauss sniper rifle of Star Explorer. Because of the use of lengthened magnetic rails and carbon crystal bullets, the armor-piercing effect is very good, and it can be seen in many operations and battles. A special police officer once used this gun to hold the robbers who wearing power armor and said, "If you want to turn around and run away, you must think about it. This thing is to help people detect heat without taking off their pants."
LanguageData.XGun_Probe.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_Probe.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.XGun_Probe_MM.label: Probe (Melee MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_Probe_MM.description: A gauss sniper rifle of Star Explorer. Because of the use of lengthened magnetic rails and carbon crystal bullets, the armor-piercing effect is very good, and it can be seen in many operations and battles. A special police officer once used this gun to hold the robbers who wearing power armor and said, "If you want to turn around and run away, you must think about it. This thing is to help people detect heat without taking off their pants."
LanguageData.XGun_Probe_MM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_Probe_MM.tools.1.label: blade
LanguageData.XGun_Probe_SM.label: Probe (Shooting MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_Probe_SM.description: A gauss sniper rifle of Star Explorer. Because of the use of lengthened magnetic rails and carbon crystal bullets, the armor-piercing effect is very good, and it can be seen in many operations and battles. A special police officer once used this gun to hold the robbers who wearing power armor and said, "If you want to turn around and run away, you must think about it. This thing is to help people detect heat without taking off their pants."
LanguageData.XGun_Probe_SM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_Probe_SM.tools.1.label: barrel

LanguageData.XGun_ProbeM.description: A gauss sniper rifle of Star Explorer. Because of the use of lengthened magnetic rails and carbon crystal bullets, the armor-piercing effect is very good, and it can be seen in many operations and battles. A special police officer once used this gun to hold the robbers who wearing power armor and said, "If you want to turn around and run away, you must think about it. This thing is to help people detect heat without taking off their pants."
LanguageData.XGun_ProbeM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_ProbeM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_RedLine.label: 14.5 Hollow Point Bullet
LanguageData.XGun_RedLine.label: Red Line
LanguageData.XGun_RedLine.description: A rifle used for the long-range assassination. The red gun body plus the red laser and the tinting sound made by the shell hitting the ground during unloading are the characteristics of this gun, as conspicuous as a star. Is it really okay to use this gun to assassinate? "Using chaos as a cloak, fear as a blade". This is why XEO's assassins are never low-key. This eye-catching gun hinted at "I'm Here". It has a poignant story. Once a pair of assassin lovers received an order from the elders to kill each other or they would be executed. They don’t want to kill each other, they can’t fight face to face, so they decided to solve it with sniping. Who found each other shot first. As a result, the dead side was holding a red-line rifle with a blank bullet in the clip. Another person knew that he was sad and committed suicide, but why would the elders give such orders? Because XEO organizations strictly prohibit homosexuality.
LanguageData.XGun_RedLine.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_RedLine.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_RedLine_MM.label: 14.5 Hollow Point Bullet
LanguageData.XGun_RedLine_MM.label: Red Line (Melee MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_RedLine_MM.description: A rifle used for the long-range assassination. The red gun body plus the red laser and the tinting sound made by the shell hitting the ground during unloading are the characteristics of this gun, as conspicuous as a star. Is it really okay to use this gun to assassinate? "Using chaos as a cloak, fear as a blade". This is why XEO's assassins are never low-key. This eye-catching gun hinted at "I'm Here". It has a poignant story. Once a pair of assassin lovers received an order from the elders to kill each other or they would be executed. They don’t want to kill each other, they can’t fight face to face, so they decided to solve it with sniping. Who found each other shot first. As a result, the dead side was holding a red-line rifle with a blank bullet in the clip. Another person knew that he was sad and committed suicide, but why would the elders give such orders? Because XEO organizations strictly prohibit homosexuality.
LanguageData.XGun_RedLine_MM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_RedLine_MM.tools.1.label: blade
LanguageData.Bullet_RedLine_SM.label: 14.5 Hollow Point Bullet
LanguageData.XGun_RedLine_SM.label: Red Line (Shooting MOD)
LanguageData.XGun_RedLine_SM.description: A rifle used for the long-range assassination. The red gun body plus the red laser and the tinting sound made by the shell hitting the ground during unloading are the characteristics of this gun, as conspicuous as a star. Is it really okay to use this gun to assassinate? "Using chaos as a cloak, fear as a blade". This is why XEO's assassins are never low-key. This eye-catching gun hinted at "I'm Here". It has a poignant story. Once a pair of assassin lovers received an order from the elders to kill each other or they would be executed. They don’t want to kill each other, they can’t fight face to face, so they decided to solve it with sniping. Who found each other shot first. As a result, the dead side was holding a red-line rifle with a blank bullet in the clip. Another person knew that he was sad and committed suicide, but why would the elders give such orders? Because XEO organizations strictly prohibit homosexuality.
LanguageData.XGun_RedLine_SM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_RedLine_SM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.XGun_RedLineM.label: Red Line MIL
LanguageData.XGun_RedLineM.description: A rifle used for the long-range assassination. The red gun body plus the red laser and the tinting sound made by the shell hitting the ground during unloading are the characteristics of this gun, as conspicuous as a star. Is it really okay to use this gun to assassinate? "Using chaos as a cloak, fear as a blade". This is why XEO's assassins are never low-key. This eye-catching gun hinted at "I'm Here". It has a poignant story. Once a pair of assassin lovers received an order from the elders to kill each other or they would be executed. They don’t want to kill each other, they can’t fight face to face, so they decided to solve it with sniping. Who found each other shot first. As a result, the dead side was holding a red-line rifle with a blank bullet in the clip. Another person knew that he was sad and committed suicide, but why would the elders give such orders? Because XEO organizations strictly prohibit homosexuality.
LanguageData.XGun_RedLineM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_RedLineM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_BigCannon.label: 12 pound Ball
LanguageData.XGun_BigCannon.label: Big Cannon
LanguageData.XGun_BigCannon.description: Blunt damage weapon. The bullets of this weapon can fly through the wall. A 12-pound cannon with solid shells, although holding this weapon can make people look strange. But as a pirate, it is reasonable and logical to use this gun to bombard people.
LanguageData.XGun_BigCannon.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_BigCannon.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.XGun_BigCannonM.label: Big Cannon MIL
LanguageData.XGun_BigCannonM.description: Blunt damage weapon. The bullets of this weapon can fly through the wall. A 12-pound cannon with solid shells, although holding this weapon can make people look strange. But as a pirate, it is reasonable and logical to use this gun to bombard people.
LanguageData.XGun_BigCannonM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_BigCannonM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_LightSpear.label: Plasma
LanguageData.XGun_LightSpear.label: Light Spear
LanguageData.XGun_LightSpear.description: A heat damage sniper rifle in the Pirate King's period. It fires plasma. They were designed to compensate for the shortcomings of the hot rifles in long-range combat. They controlled the amount of plasma fired to improve the stability of long-distance flight and the time for guns to re-cool.
LanguageData.XGun_LightSpear.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_LightSpear.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.XGun_LightSpearM.label: Light Spear MIL
LanguageData.XGun_LightSpearM.description: A heat damage sniper rifle in the Pirate King's period. It fires plasma. They were designed to compensate for the shortcomings of the hot rifles in long-range combat. They controlled the amount of plasma fired to improve the stability of long-distance flight and the time for guns to re-cool.
LanguageData.XGun_LightSpearM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_LightSpearM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_16R.label: 80mm Missile
LanguageData.XGun_16R.label: Ruins Maker(One-time Weapon)
LanguageData.XGun_16R.description: For One-time use only. 16 rounds of rocket artillery. The lethality is huge, the weight is amazing, and of course, the cost is also amazing too. There used to be a Jaeger force attacking the town where XEO was located. Unfortunately, the soldiers were constantly harassed by the assassins. The commander was finally mad after a few days and ordered the bombing of the town with this thing. The soldiers were shocked by his decision. After a round of explosions, everyone looking at the ruins couldn't get anything, and the commander would also have to subsidize the military expenses of the operation.
LanguageData.XGun_16R.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_Shock.label: Shockwave
LanguageData.XGun_Shock.label: Shock(One-time Weapon)
LanguageData.XGun_Shock.description: For One-time use only. Effective in destroying buildings and stun the target when hit. The use of special waves to cause resonance effects can cause tremendous damage to the building. Must remember where you stand before using it, and it will be terrible if you don’t. A story is printed on the cover of the manual to warn users. A story is printed on the cover of the manual to warn users. There was a model who was targeted by the leader because she was too useless. The leader asked her to tear down a wall in the town that needed to be rebuilt. If she could not complete it, she would be sold. It sounds like a very simple job, but when she saw her "Bio Menu", she realized that it was an impossible task. When she was trying to find other ways, a stargazer merchant passed by and sold her a handful of things, saying that it could be solved for her. The merchant repeatedly told her to read the manual before using it. A few minutes later, she finished reading it and picked up the thing and shoot at the wall. Then she immediately fainted, and when she woke up again, she found herself in the wilderness, and saw the madness leader heading at her with a pistol. Yes, she has read the manual, but she can't understand what fucking is written on it.
LanguageData.XGun_Shock.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.Proj_GrenadeMolotov.label: Molotov
LanguageData.XGun_MolotovExpress.label: Molotov Express(One-time Weapon)
LanguageData.XGun_MolotovExpress.description: For One-time use only. It is said that there was a lazy drunkard who called the nearby bar every day to send drinks. His voice was very annoying and the speech was even more aggressive. On a New Year’s night, The bar business was so good and the bartender was busy but kept receiving his phone call. Finally, the bartender was annoyed by him, he used this thing to express some "Molotov" for him, and then the bartender joined the Flame Legion.
LanguageData.XGun_MolotovExpress.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_SightReaper.label: 30cm Flash Bomb
LanguageData.XGun_SightReaper.label: Sight Reaper(One-time Weapon)
LanguageData.XGun_SightReaper.description: For One-time use only. Blinding of the hit target. Don't look around, all look at me! A BIG Bomb here!
LanguageData.XGun_SightReaper.tools.0.label: barrel
